c.d: The total count of unique collage templates or customizable layouts available to users
Availability across major platforms such as iOS, Android, and Web
Inclusion of AI tools such as background removal, template generation, and image enhancement
Range and quality of editing options including filters, text addition, stickers, cropping, and adjustments
Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app interface for beginner and casual users
Cost structure including free availability, subscriptions, or one-time purchases
Ability to link with social media accounts and share collages directly
Support for adding not only photos but also GIFs, videos, and animations within collages
